results.stated: Not fully determined from the observations. The affine mod-53 rule [x',y']=[22x+11y,27x+41y] mod 53 fits many shown consecutive transitions but fails at least [39,16]->[4,29], where it gives [27,13]. With the law class undisclosed, infinitely many deterministic integer-valued transition functions can match all shown samples while assigning different held-out intermediate states.
